strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, custom test runner)
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching JD requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Cloud experience narrow — AWS CDK noted, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate well exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node/React experience, a strong testing/craftsmanship ethos, and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP work matching a key JD requirement. Gaps around Nest.js specifically and limited recent Kotlin/Java are notable but learnable given the breadth of languages already demonstrated. Overall a strong fit worth interviewing.
